reference: My daughter has small red pimple-looking bumps on her outer thigh. They started on the left leg and have spread to her left arm and now her right leg. Some of them have white heads. I popped one of them last night and liquid pus came out. They do not itch or hurt her. Help!!!
text: My daughter has small red, pimple-looking bumps on her outer thigh. They started on the left leg and have spread to her left arm and now her right leg. Some of them have white heads. I popped one of them last night, and liquid pus came out. They do not itch or hurt her. Help.
